machinery_genes.quote: We analyzed the 8.5-kb virC region and showed that it is most probably a single operon containing 13 open reading frames called yscA to yscM (for Yop secretion).
machinery_genes.note: yscB is one of the 13 ORFs of the virC operon named here as required for Yop secretion. No separate per-gene functional quote; role assigned as a virC-operon Ysc apparatus component. Lower-confidence individual call.

machinery_genes.quote: Protein YscC has a putative signal sequence and shares significant homology with outer membrane proteins involved in the secretion of pullulanase by Klebsiella pneumoniae (PulD) or in the assembly of filamentous bacteriophages (gene IV product).
machinery_genes.note: YscC = the T3SS outer-membrane secretin (SctC/PulD-family). Michiels et al 1991, Y. enterocolitica virC operon.

machinery_genes.quote: At least the putative products of yscD, yscJ, and yscL were shown to be required for the export of Yops.
machinery_genes.note: YscD = SctD inner MS-ring (apparatus brief). Shown required for Yop export, Michiels 1991.

machinery_genes.quote: The yscE, FG, I, J and K mutants were defective in Yop secretion and independent of Ca2+ (CI) for their growth at 37 degrees C.
machinery_genes.note: Allaoui et al 1995, non-polar mutants of virC operon; yscE required for Yop secretion.

machinery_genes.quote: The yscE, FG, I, J and K mutants were defective in Yop secretion and independent of Ca2+ (CI) for their growth at 37 degrees C.
machinery_genes.note: YscF = SctF needle subunit (apparatus brief). Allaoui 1995 shows yscF required for Yop secretion; substitution of N-terminal residues of YscF impaired YopB/YopD secretion.

machinery_genes.role: secretion apparatus component (needle-assembly chaperone for YscF)
machinery_genes.quote: The yscE, FG, I, J and K mutants were defective in Yop secretion and independent of Ca2+ (CI) for their growth at 37 degrees C.
machinery_genes.note: Allaoui 1995; yscG required for Yop secretion. Apparatus component (later characterized as part of the YscE/YscF/YscG needle-tip-complex chaperone module).

machinery_genes.quote: The yscE, FG, I, J and K mutants were defective in Yop secretion and independent of Ca2+ (CI) for their growth at 37 degrees C.
machinery_genes.note: YscI = SctI inner rod (apparatus brief). Allaoui 1995 shows yscI required for Yop secretion.

machinery_genes.quote: At least the putative products of yscD, yscJ, and yscL were shown to be required for the export of Yops. YscJ turned out to be YlpB, a lipoprotein that we had detected previously.
machinery_genes.note: YscJ = SctJ inner-ring lipoprotein (apparatus brief). Michiels 1991 shows required for Yop export and identifies it as the lipoprotein YlpB.

machinery_genes.quote: The yscE, FG, I, J and K mutants were defective in Yop secretion and independent of Ca2+ (CI) for their growth at 37 degrees C.
machinery_genes.note: YscK = SctK C-ring base (apparatus brief). Allaoui 1995 shows yscK required for Yop secretion.

machinery_genes.quote: At least the putative products of yscD, yscJ, and yscL were shown to be required for the export of Yops.
machinery_genes.note: YscL = SctL ATPase stator / C-ring link (apparatus brief); later characterized as the negative regulator of the YscN ATPase. Michiels 1991 shows required for Yop export.

machinery_genes.quote: We conclude that YscN is a component of the Yop secretion machinery using ATP. We hypothesize that it is either the energizer of this machinery or a part of it.
machinery_genes.note: YscN = SctN cytoplasmic ATPase (apparatus brief). Woestyn et al 1994; first gene of the virB operon.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: yscO is one of the virB-operon genes (yscN to yscU) shown essential for Yop secretion by Bergman et al 1994 (Y. pseudotuberculosis lcrB cluster, homologous Ysc system). Role = SctO ATPase stalk from apparatus brief.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: yscP within virB locus (yscN to yscU), Bergman et al 1994. Role = SctP needle-length ruler from apparatus brief.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: yscQ within virB locus (yscN to yscU), Bergman et al 1994. Role = SctQ C-ring/sorting platform from apparatus brief.

machinery_genes.quote: An lcrH yscR double mutant expressed the Yops at an increased level but did not secrete Yops into the culture supernatant.
machinery_genes.note: YscR = SctR export gate (apparatus brief). Bergman et al 1994 name yscR within the virB/lcrB secretion cluster and show the yscR mutant fails to secrete Yops.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: yscS within virB locus (yscN to yscU), Bergman et al 1994. Role = SctS export gate from apparatus brief.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: yscT within virB locus (yscN to yscU), Bergman et al 1994. Role = SctT export gate from apparatus brief.

machinery_genes.quote: Here, we have shown that the lcrB/virB locus (yscN to yscU) encodes gene products essential for Yop secretion.
machinery_genes.note: YscU = SctU export-gate autoprotease/switch (apparatus brief). Terminal gene of the virB locus (yscN to yscU), Bergman et al 1994.

machinery_genes.quote: lcrD/yscV, encodes a 77-kDa inner membrane protein that is required for Yop secretion
machinery_genes.note: YscV (= LcrD) = SctV major export-apparatus ring (apparatus brief). Encoded in the virA locus. Named by the Cornelis et al 1998 review of the Y. enterocolitica/pseudotuberculosis Ysc system.

machinery_genes.quote: we suggest that it be renamed YscW
machinery_genes.note: YscW (= VirG), a monocistronic gene upstream of the virC operon; the pilotin lipoprotein required for assembly/insertion of the YscC secretin. Named in Cornelis et al 1998 review.

machinery_genes.quote: We identified three new elements of the Yop virulon: SycN, required for normal secretion of YopN, and YscX and YscY, two new components of the secretion machinery.
machinery_genes.note: Iriarte & Cornelis 1999 name YscX as a new component of the Ysc secretion machinery. (SycN is a chaperone, excluded.)

machinery_genes.quote: We identified three new elements of the Yop virulon: SycN, required for normal secretion of YopN, and YscX and YscY, two new components of the secretion machinery.
machinery_genes.note: Iriarte & Cornelis 1999 name YscY as a new component of the Ysc secretion machinery.

machinery_genes.quote: Yop secretion is triggered by contact with eukaryotic cells and controlled by proteins of the virulon including YopN, TyeA, and LcrG, which are thought to form a plug complex closing the bacterial secretion channel.
machinery_genes.note: YopN (+TyeA) = the SctW gatekeeper/plug in the apparatus brief (synonym YopN+TyeA), forming the channel-closing plug complex; this is the gatekeeper apparatus, not a translocated effector. LcrG is a cytoplasmic regulator and is excluded.

machinery_genes.quote: Yop secretion is triggered by contact with eukaryotic cells and controlled by proteins of the virulon including YopN, TyeA, and LcrG, which are thought to form a plug complex closing the bacterial secretion channel.
machinery_genes.note: TyeA is the YopN partner in the SctW gatekeeper plug (apparatus brief lists the Yersinia SctW as 'YopN+TyeA'). Lower-confidence as a standalone apparatus call; included because the brief treats the gatekeeper as machinery.

machinery_genes.quote: the others (YopB, YopD, and LcrV) form the translocation apparatus that is deployed at the bacterial surface to deliver the effectors into the eukaryotic cells, across their plasma membrane
machinery_genes.note: YopB is part of the host-membrane translocon (apparatus, not effector, per the apparatus brief). Cornelis et al 1998.

machinery_genes.quote: the others (YopB, YopD, and LcrV) form the translocation apparatus that is deployed at the bacterial surface to deliver the effectors into the eukaryotic cells, across their plasma membrane
machinery_genes.note: YopD is part of the host-membrane translocon (apparatus, not effector). Cornelis et al 1998.

machinery_genes.quote: the others (YopB, YopD, and LcrV) form the translocation apparatus that is deployed at the bacterial surface to deliver the effectors into the eukaryotic cells, across their plasma membrane
machinery_genes.note: LcrV (V antigen) = the needle-tip protein of the translocation apparatus (tip/translocon role in the apparatus brief). Cornelis et al 1998.

notes: System = the Yersinia Ysc-Yop injectisome (type III secretion system), the archetypal animal-pathogen Ysc/Sct T3SS, encoded on the ~70-kb pYV virulence plasmid. The pYV plasmid of Y. enterocolitica 8081 carries this Ysc apparatus together with the Yop effectors of this instance. The apparatus genes were characterized largely in Y. enterocolitica strain W22703/E40 (and the homologous Y. pseudotuberculosis lcrB cluster) by the Cornelis and Wolf-Watz groups; per the separated-paper rule these primary papers on the same Ysc system family are used for the naming quotes. Core apparatus covered gene-by-gene: secretin YscC + pilotin YscW; inner-membrane rings YscD (MS-ring) and YscJ (lipoprotein); export gate YscR/S/T/U; major export ring YscV (LcrD); ATPase YscN with stator YscL and stalk YscO; C-ring YscQ and base YscK; inner rod YscI; needle YscF with assembly factors YscE/YscG and ruler YscP; accessory components YscB, YscX, YscY; gatekeeper YopN+TyeA; and the host-membrane translocon YopB/YopD/LcrV (apparatus per the brief, not effectors). Deliberately EXCLUDED as non-machinery: yscH (= the secreted effector YopR, Allaoui 1995); yscM (negative regulator of Yop synthesis, Allaoui 1995); yscA (the virC ORF dispensable for secretion, 'Nonpolar yscA...mutants are not impaired in Yop secretion'); the Syc chaperones (SycE/SycH/SycN/SycT etc.); the cytoplasmic regulator LcrG and transcriptional activator VirF/LcrF; and the curated effectors of this instance (YopE/YopH/YopO/YopM/YopP/YopT). Lower-confidence individual calls: YscB (named only as a virC-operon ORF, no separate functional quote) and TyeA (included only because the apparatus brief treats the YopN+TyeA gatekeeper as machinery). The virB-operon genes yscO/yscP/yscQ/yscS/yscT are anchored by the Bergman 1994 'yscN to yscU' cluster quote rather than individual-gene quotes. All quotes verbatim from the cited PubMed abstracts / PMC full texts. RefSeq genome NC_008791.1 was NOT mined; locus-tag resolution is a separate downstream step.
